Unsurprisingly, we had another volatile week in the markets, and major U.S. indices closed this one in the red:

- S&P 500 was down 1.6% for the week
- Nasdaq lost -1.26%
- The Dow Jones is down the most, -1.99%

In total, around $2 trillion was wiped out from the US stock market
